entries.claim: Search, read, list, and export payloads carry source identifiers, and reads report byte-budget truncation over model-facing UTF-8 content.
entries.evidence: 22 retrieval tests passed, including search_returns_source_tagged_hits_across_names_and_bodies, read_includes_source_object, read_respects_byte_budget_and_flags_truncation, list_pages_flat_service_items_with_count, and export_raw_passthrough_carries_source_ids.

entries.claim: The real StoreArchive path reads encrypted/sealed archived bodies through the envelope-aware reader and supports the structured retrieval feature build.
entries.command: cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-agent --features retrieval retrieval -- --nocapture && cargo +1.95.0 test -p isyncyou-agent --features retrieval store_archive -- --nocapture
entries.evidence: The retrieval feature run passed 26 retrieval tests, including calendar/contact export source coverage; the store_archive run passed 7 tests, including store_archive_reads_sealed_body_with_envelope_reader.

entries.claim: The app-host experimental agent build binds read-class actions to a real StoreArchive-backed RetrievalExecutor.
entries.evidence: 18 app-host feature tests passed, including experimental_agent_executor_reads_store_archive_fixture, which executed Search, Read, List, and Export through make_executor against a temp StoreArchive fixture with a sealed body.
